title: Kaia Health - Digital MSK Platform
problem: Musculoskeletal pain management requires ongoing physical therapy, which is costly, access-limited, and inconvenient for patients.
solution: Digital MSK platform with AI-powered exercise coaching using computer vision motion tracking via smartphone camera.
technology: Computer vision pose estimation, AI coaching, mobile app, behavioral science
traction_signals: Partnerships with major employers and insurers
regulatory_notes: CE marked Class II medical device in EU, FDA pathway ongoing
varden_fit: HIGH - Digital MSK pathway from orthopedics. Strong EU presence. Could integrate with specialty routing.
notes: Leading European digital MSK player. Good fit for orthopedic-to-digital pathway.
